zh.lifeSummary: 當George Sandys於1465年出生在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德時，他的父親William Sandes31歲，母親Margaret Rawlinson30歲。他於大約1483年與Margaret Curwen在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1509年在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾被列為bow-bearer of le old parc。他去世於1513年在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Sandys于1465年出生在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德时，他的父亲William Sandes31岁，母亲Margaret Rawlinson30岁。他于大约1483年与Margaret Curwen在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1509年在英国維斯特莫藍德肯達爾被列为bow-bearer of le old parc。他去世于1513年在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When George Sandys was born in 1465, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, his father, William Sandes, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Rawlinson, was 30. He married Margaret Curwen about 1483, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1509, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as bow-bearer of le old parc in Kendal, Westmorland, England. He died in 1513, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Sandys est né en 1465, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William Sandes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Rawlinson, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Curwen environ 1483, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1509, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est bow-bearer of le old parc à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1513, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Sandys 1465 in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sandes 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Rawlinson 30. Er hat um 1483 in Lancashire, England Margaret Curwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1509, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als bow-bearer of le old parc in Kendal, Westmorland, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1513 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Sandys è nato il nel 1465 nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William Sandes, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Rawlinson, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Curwen circa 1483, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1509, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come bow-bearer of le old parc nel Kendal, Westmorland, England. Morì nel 1513, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Hawkshead, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Sandysが1465年にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで生まれた時，父William Sandesは31歳，母Margaret Rawlinsonは30歳であった。約1483年にイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret Curwenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1509年，44歳の時，イギリスウエストモーランドケンダルでの職業はbow-bearer of le old parcと記録されている。彼は1513年に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Sandys(이)가 1465년 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sandes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Rawlinson(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1483년 영국 랭카실르에서 Margaret Curwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1509년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 bow-bearer of le old parc이었다. 그는 1513년 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Sandys nasceu em 1465, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Sandes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Rawlinson, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Curwen aproximadamente 1483, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1509, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como bow-bearer of le old parc em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1513, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Sandys родился в 1465 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Sandes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Rawlinson, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Curwen около 1483 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1509 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии bow-bearer of le old parc в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия. Он умер в 1513 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Sandys nació en 1465, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Sandes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Rawlinson, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Curwen aproximadamente 1483, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1509, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era bow-bearer of le old parc en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Murió en 1513, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
